group.value: Group A — opponents Mexico, South Korea, Czechia

manager.value: Hugo Broos (Belgian); 2026 WC is his last role as a manager

qualification.value: Topped CAF qualifying Group C ahead of Nigeria, sealed with a 3-0 win over Rwanda — first World Cup since 2010

key_players.value: Ronwen Williams (GK, captain — AFCON penalty-save record holder), Lyle Foster (striker, Burnley); 19 of the 26 squad based in the South African league

wc_history.value: Hosted the 2010 World Cup (first held on African soil); did not advance past the group stage as hosts. 2026 is their first World Cup appearance since.

wc_role.value: Plays Mexico in the tournament-opening match on June 11, 2026 at Estadio Azteca — the same fixture that opened the 2010 World Cup they hosted

image.attribution: Flag design by Frederick Brownell, image by Wikimedia Commons users / Public domain via Wikimedia Commons
